error_signature: if row exists doesn't return the expected row
title: 'If Row Exists' Node Not Returning Expected Data
symptom: The 'If Row Exists' node returns the output from the preceding node instead of the expected row data when a match is found.
applies_when: Expecting to retrieve existing row data
not_this_if: The node is configured correctly with 'Always Output Data' toggled on
root_cause: The 'If Row Exists' node behaves differently than other nodes by passing through the input data if a match is found. If the 'Always Output Data' option is not enabled, it will not output anything, leading to confusion.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the 'If Row Exists' node
Test the workflow again to see if the expected row data is returned
agent_instruction: Enable 'Always Output Data' in the 'If Row Exists' node settings and save the workflow.
